message:
beads: flush issues.jsonl updates from concurrent agent work

Routine JSONL export from br sync --flush-only capturing incremental
status/comment/dependency changes made by agents during the current
session. Net diff is small (26 line churn) and consists of:

  - Updated timestamps + close_reason text on previously-closed beads
    as follow-up context gets appended.
  - New comment threads on open beads discussing implementation
    approaches — these matter for traceability when future agents
    pick the issues up.
  - Dependency edge additions/removals reflecting triage done via bv
    --robot-triage during the session.

.ntm/logs/* left uncommitted deliberately: those are daemon
supervisor logs that are tracked in git but whose content is
appended every run (mostly "unrecognized subcommand" error lines
from a legacy invocation). Treating them as ephemeral for this
commit to keep the diff focused on actual issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
